parameters.query:
SELECT
  order_number,
  status,
  items,
  total_amount,
  created_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - created_at)) / 3600 AS hours_ago
FROM table_1
column_1 $1
  column_2 $2::uuid
  column_3 $3::uuid
  AND status IN ('enquiry', 'placed', 'pending', 'confirmed')
  AND payment_status NOT IN ('confirmed')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH new_code AS (
  SELECT msq_generate_escalation_code() AS code
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO table_2 (
    tenant_id, business_id, reply_code,
    customer_chat_id, customer_platform,
    question_text, status, expires_at
  )
  SELECT
    $1::uuid, $2::uuid, new_code.code,
    $3, 'telegram', $4, 'pending',
    now() + INTERVAL '48 hours'
  FROM table_3
  RETURNING id, reply_code
)
SELECT
  i.id            AS escalation_id,
  i.reply_code,
  t.telegram_id   AS owner_telegram_id,
  pi.access_token AS owner_bot_token
FROM table_4 i
JOIN table_5 t ON t.id = $1::uuid
JOIN table_6 pi
  ON pi.business_id = $2::uuid AND pi.platform = 'telegram'

-- Find product photos matching items in this escalation
-- Looks at both order items and the escalation text for product name hints
WITH item_names AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT LOWER(COALESCE(co.items_text, '')) AS src
  FROM (
    SELECT json_array_elements(o.items::json)->>'name' AS items_text
    FROM table_1 o
    WHERE o.customer_chat_id = $1
      AND o.business_id      = $2::uuid
      AND o.status IN ('enquiry','placed','pending','confirmed')
      AND o.payment_status NOT IN ('confirmed')
    LIMIT 10
  ) co
  WHERE co.items_text IS NOT NULL AND co.items_text <> ''
  UNION ALL
  -- Also extract hints from table_7 text itself
  SELECT LOWER($3)
)
SELECT DISTINCT ON (pi.id)
  pi.id::text,
  COALESCE(pi.display_name, pi.product_name) AS product_name,
  pi.minio_url,
  pi.price,
  pi.price_label
FROM table_8 pi
JOIN table_9 n ON
  n.src ILIKE '%' || LOWER(COALESCE(pi.display_name, pi.product_name)) || '%'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(pi.display_name, pi.product_name)) ILIKE '%' || n.src || '%'
WHERE pi.business_id = $2::uuid
  AND pi.minio_url IS NOT NULL
  AND pi.image_type = 'product'
LIMIT 5
